snapshot.narrative: The transcription_engine project has a healthy mix of issues, with a focus on improving the transcription pipeline and enhancing overall functionality. Many issues are marked as ready, making them accessible for contributors.

themes.name: Transcription Improvements
themes.description: Issues aimed at enhancing the transcription pipeline and related methodologies.

themes.name: Error Handling Enhancements
themes.description: Improvements aimed at expanding the custom exception hierarchy for better error management.

themes.name: YouTube Automation
themes.description: Features related to automating tasks for YouTube, including commenting and summarization.

shortlist.title: Add transcripts for MIT Bitcoin Expo 2025
shortlist.plainSummary: Transcribe MIT Bitcoin Expo 2025 videos and save results in PostgreSQL.
shortlist.pickReason: Labeled good first issue with clear scope for new contributors.

shortlist.title: Add Transcripts for Bitcoin MENA 2025
shortlist.plainSummary: Transcribe Bitcoin MENA 2025 event and store results in PostgreSQL.
shortlist.pickReason: Straightforward transcription task suitable for beginners.

shortlist.title: Update all The Upstream and Downstream Handlers/Services according to new schema
shortlist.plainSummary: Update handlers and services to align with a new schema in the current pipeline.
shortlist.pickReason: Ready issue with a defined refactor scope.

issues.title: Add transcripts for MIT Bitcoin Expo 2025
issues.plainSummary: Transcribe MIT Bitcoin Expo 2025 videos and save results in PostgreSQL.

issues.title: Improving Transcription Pipeline : CoS2W Methodology
issues.plainSummary: Improve the transcription pipeline using CoS2W methodology for domain-specific terminology.

issues.title: YT Auto-Commenter
issues.plainSummary: Auto-commenting feature for YouTube videos after transcription and summarization.

issues.title: Update all The Upstream and Downstream Handlers/Services according to new schema
issues.plainSummary: Update handlers and services to align with a new schema in the current pipeline.

issues.title: ENH: Update Database Schema for the project
issues.plainSummary: Update database schema to accommodate more sources and downstream applications.
